pi_items.source: Web search of Microsoft Edge Add-ons store confirmed multiple Color Picker extensions available. Search results include: Color Picker, Click Color Picker, Hex Color Picker, ColorFish Color Picker, Color Picker - Eyedropper Tool, and at least 5+ other variations.
Code analysis: Path is consistently referenced in task.json (line 19), setup_task.sh (line 6), and export_result.sh (line 6). All references use the identical path.
Verifier logic (line 77) checks for 'Name' header. Valid extension names found in practice include 'Color Picker', 'Click Color Picker', 'Hex Color Picker', all containing required keywords.
Verifier expects 'Publisher' header (line 77, case-insensitive check). Publisher information is displayed on Microsoft Edge Add-ons extension detail pages in rendered interface.

Verifier checks for 'Rating' header and validates rating is numeric 0-5 (lines 77, 115-117). Web scraping confirmed extension ratings: Color Picker (5.0), Click Color Picker (5.0), Hex Color Picker (4.0).

Verifier checks for 'Users' header and requires content to contain digits (lines 77, 122-124). Web scraping confirmed user counts: Color Picker (13023), Click Color Picker (5518), Hex Color Picker (65404).
Verifier checks for 'Description' header and requires content >5 characters (lines 77, 127-128). Extension descriptions are available on Microsoft Edge Add-ons detail pages.

Web search identified 10+ Color Picker extensions on Microsoft Edge Add-ons store: Color Picker, Click Color Picker, Hex Color Picker, ColorFish Color Picker, Color Picker - Eyedropper Tool, Snap Color Picker, TabColor Color Picker, 1-Click Color Picker, eyedropper-color-picker, Color Finder. Minimum of 3 is easily achievable.

pi_items.metadata_value: IT Desktop Engineer - software procurement and vetting
pi_items.verified_value: IT Desktop Engineer - software procurement and vetting
pi_items.source: Task description context: researching and evaluating browser extensions from official Microsoft store is appropriate work for an IT Desktop Engineer responsible for software procurement and vetting decisions for organizational use.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Microsoft Edge Add-ons store at https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons with genuine Color Picker extensions. Multiple extensions with this name exist (10+ variants found), all displaying public information including Name, Publisher, numeric Rating (4-5 stars), User Count (thousands of users), and Descriptions. The output CSV should be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/extension_comparison.csv with headers: Name, Publisher, Rating, Users, Description. Real extension data found: Color Picker (Rating 5.0, 13,023 users), Click Color Picker (Rating 5.0, 5,518 users), Hex Color Picker (Rating 4.0, 65,404 users). All metadata claims are accurate and reflect real publicly-available data from the Microsoft Edge Add-ons store.
